Our Premium Services

Comprehensive dental care with state-of-the-art technology and expert professionals

Teeth Cleaning

Professional deep cleaning to remove plaque and ensure optimal oral hygiene.

From ₹1,500

Root Canal

Painless root canal treatment to save your natural teeth with advanced tech.

From ₹5,000

Dental Implant

Permanent tooth replacement solution with titanium implants for natural look.

From ₹25,000

Braces

Traditional & invisible aligners to perfectly align your teeth and smile.

From ₹35,000

Teeth Whitening

Professional whitening treatment for a brighter, more confident smile.

From ₹8,000

Smile Makeover

Complete smile transformation with veneers, bonding, and cosmetic procedures.

From ₹50,000
